violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the upstairs bar. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026

Cubed tuna was observed thawed in intact reduced oxygen packaging (ROP). Seafood items packaged within ROP packaging shall be completely removed from its original packaging prior to thawing. Food item was observed held at 37 degrees Fahrenheit and was removed from its original packaging during the time of inspection. Guidance provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on all prep units and the grill cooler. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2026
The floor coating in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2026
The hand-washing sink in the upstairs bar was observed being used as dump sink. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the expo prep unit, salad prep unit and the cookline prep units. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2025
